title: cynoglossum montanum subvar. natolicum
intro: Cynoglossum montanum subvar. natolicum, also known as the mountain hound's tongue, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum montanum subvar. natolicum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
